# BREATHE Respiratory Care SuperPowers Source Pack

These 17 development-source components are embedded in the one-file Complete Edition. The user-facing installation entrypoint is the complete Hermes program in the parent package. Do not install source components separately or merge them with another population.

**Lane:** `respiratory_care` • **Route:** `/respiratory-care` • **Namespace:** `resp_breathe.*` • **Home:** `My BREATHE`<br>
**Default:** Private Respiratory OS • no PHI • no live care • no device data/control • conversation memory session-only • persistence approval-required • all 24 powers Available Inactive • all 10 agents PERM-P0 Disabled
